requirements: [IMAGE_INPUT] 3.4 Academic Records and Grading e The system shall allow lecturers to submit grades for enrolled students. e The system shall allow lecturers to update submitted grades before finalization. e The system shall calculate grade point averages automatically.  e The system shall generate academic performance reports for students.  3.5 Reporting and Notifications e The system shall generate reports in PDF format. e The system shall notify students via email when grades are published.  e The system shall log report generation activities for audit purposes.
